program.name: Larimer County Conservation Corps
program.description_short: Free home efficiency assessments for Fort Collins and Loveland Utilities customers
program.description: Larimer County Conservation Corps offers FREE basic home efficiency assessments to Fort Collins Utilities and Loveland Utilities customers. During a 1-1.5 hour assessment two crew members: - Install LED light bulbs, water conserving shower-heads and faucet aerators, smoke/carbon monoxide detectors, clotheslines, furnace air filters and outdoor hose timers and nozzles. - Educate customers about water and energy efficiency practices and other services offered by the utility provider. - Take a quick look around the home - checking appliances, toilets, and your heating and cooling system. Then share any rebate options or special offers available by upgrading to high-efficiency appliances.
program.estimated_delivery_time: 1 week to receive assessment upon scheduling
program.website_description: Free home efficiency assessments for Fort Collins and Loveland Utilities customers
